Available for senior roles

Kristian López

Software Architect · Staff Engineer

I design and build distributed systems that scale. Specialized in microservices, event-driven architectures, AWS cloud-native deployments, and clean, testable codebases that teams can maintain for years.

Featured Projects

All projects →

Rust Microservices on AWS EKS

Production deployment of Rust-based microservices on Amazon EKS using Distroless containers, IRSA for S3 and Secrets Manager access, and a full GitOps CI/CD pipeline.

Rust AWS EKS Docker

Restaurant POS & Payments Platform

End-to-end point-of-sale and payment processing platform for restaurant chains, including CFDI 4.0 tax compliance, Kafka-based event streaming, and multi-tenant architecture.

Java Spring Boot Kafka
